response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced full-stack and web engineer with a broad language portfolio, but he does not meet the core mandatory requirements for this role. His C++ experience is limited to approximately six months at National Instruments and a bachelor thesis project, far short of the 5–10 years required. His career is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web technologies. There is no evidence of Windows platform development, SQL Server or Oracle usage, or any exposure to fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking systems. The brief stint at RIDE Capital involved investment-adjacent work but solely in Node/TypeScript with no financial-product domain depth.
strengths: 15+ years of professional software development demonstrating strong adaptability across languages and problem domains
Hands-on CI/CD experience including GitLab instance administration, Docker, and build infrastructure
Java exposure at Altom Consulting for robotics projects, satisfying one optional desirable skill
concerns: C++ experience totals under one year (NI LabWindows role, ~6 months), versus the 5–10 years mandated
Zero demonstrated knowledge of fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking products
No Windows platform development history and no SQL Server or Oracle experience cited anywhere in the resume
